_meta.role: 新馬精西亞鎮（New Magincia）的胖修士醫者，主治療傷、解毒、復活；對玩家稱『吾兒』（my child）。

translations.note: 人名音譯，四字 8 bytes 剛好

translations.en: a rotund man in monk's robes.
translations.zh: 一名身披修士袍的圓胖男子。

translations.note: Tiberius 對玩家稱『吾兒』；與 ren 拼接
字串拼接後綴 children 的 ren，保留 ASCII

translations.en: . What can I do for thee today?"

translations.note: @heal keyword 內部觸發碼，保留 ASCII
@cure keyword 內部觸發碼，保留 ASCII
@resurrect keyword 內部觸發碼，保留 ASCII

translations.en: "But thou weepest for no reason! None of thy party is dead!"
translations.zh: 「汝何故悲泣？同伴中無一人亡故！」

translations.en: "I am Tiberius, healer for this town."
"It is my responsibility to care for the sick and injured."
"I attempt to @heal, @cure, or if needed, @resurrect the fallen."
translations.zh: 「我可@heal（療傷）、@cure（解毒），必要時更可@resurrect（復活）倒下之人。」

translations.note: 與 ren 拼接成 children
len=2 緊；單個全形句號剛好

translations.en: "Come to my shop when I'm open!"
"Fret not, for all of you are well!"
"Wilt thou make an offering of 30 gold?"
Laying hands upon $Y, Tiberius mends the wounds.
translations.zh: 提貝里斯按手於$Y，傷處便已癒合。

translations.en: "If thou wilt not pay, I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「若汝不付獻金，我無法為汝療傷。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry. Without an offering I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「實感歉意。無獻金則無法為汝療傷。」

translations.en: "Thou art poor, but thy cause is just."
Laying hands upon $Y, Tiberius mends the wounds.
translations.zh: 提貝里斯按手於$Y，傷處便已癒合。

translations.en: "Is there aught else I can do for thee?"
"Come to my shop when I'm open!"
"Fret not, for all of you are well."
"Wilt thou make an offering of 10 gold?"
Laying hands upon $Y, Tiberius removes the poison.
translations.zh: 提貝里斯按手於$Y，毒素便已消散。

translations.en: "If thou wilt not pay, I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「若汝不付獻金，我無法為汝療傷。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry. Without an offering I cannot heal thee."
translations.zh: 「實感歉意。無獻金則無法為汝療傷。」

translations.en: "Thou art poor, but thy cause is just."
Laying hands upon $Y, Tiberius removes the poison.
translations.zh: 提貝里斯按手於$Y，毒素便已消散。

translations.en: "I see that $Y carries a parted friend."
"Come to my shop when I'm open!"
"Wilt thou make an offering of 400 gold?"
"Then there is naught I can do save grieve with thee."
translations.zh: 「那麼我所能為者，唯與汝同悲。」

translations.note: 保留 #1 與 \s 變數標記

translations.en: "Go see a gravedigger. I'll reckon his price'll be lower."
translations.zh: 「去找掘墓人吧，料想他索價會低些。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection for their fallen comrade.
translations.zh: 汝之同伴為亡故之友湊起一筆款項。

translations.en: Tiberius lays hands upon the corpse...

translations.note: 復活咒語音節音譯，第一節；單個 ellipsis 控 bytes
復活咒語第二節；單個 ellipsis
復活咒語末節；用半形 ! 控 bytes

translations.en: "I see that $Y carries another slain friend."

keyword_mapping.@name: @名字（內部碼 name 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@job: @職業（內部碼 job 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@bye: @再見（內部碼 bye 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@yes: @是（內部碼 yes 保留 ASCII）
keyword_mapping.@no: @否（內部碼 no 保留 ASCII）

riddles_additions.ref: Tiberius 復活咒語三節（U6 自編魔法音節，與 Mariah Zu/Quas/Hur/Jux/Ort 系統不同）
riddles_additions.strategy: 音譯保留節奏感，三段式漸強；末節用驚嘆控制 bytes

translator_notes: Tiberius 用 "my child" 對玩家親稱，譯『吾兒』展現修士口吻。三組重複的療傷／解毒／復活對話保持譯文一致以利讀者學習介面。復活咒語 Doman/thixus/anretu 為自編音節，採音譯以保留神秘感。len=2 的 ." 因中文標點佔 4 bytes 改為單『。』。對於 yn / yes / no / heal / cure / resu / name / job / bye 等 keyword 內部觸發碼一律保留 ASCII 不譯（因玩家通常輸入英文 keyword 觸發；句中 @heal/@cure/@resurrect 仍譯為中文供顯示）。0 OVERFLOW。
